args.query: SELECT gmap_id, name FROM business_description WHERE LOWER(description) LIKE '%massage%';

result.preview: "No businesses in the business_database have descriptions containing the word \u201cmassage,\u201d so I cannot identify any massage therapy businesses or compute their average ratings from the available data."
